ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the assessment is conducted */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the assessment was before or after an injury */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., initial, follow-up, annual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_injury_status FOREIGN KEY ("injury_status") REFERENCES injury_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_assistance" (
  "home_assistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home assistance record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment where the need was evaluated */,
  "need_level" INTEGER /* Level of need for home assistance (1-5 scale) */,
  "pre_injury_need" INTEGER /* Level of need for home assistance before an injury (1-5 scale) */,
  "post_injury_need" INTEGER /* Level of need for home assistance after an injury (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the home assistance need */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_assistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_assistance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_assistance" (
  "shopping_assistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping assistance record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment where the need was evaluated */,
  "pre_injury_need" INTEGER /* Level of need for shopping assistance before injury (1-4 scale) */,
  "post_injury_need" INTEGER /* Level of need for shopping assistance after injury (1-4 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the shopping assistance need */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shopping_assistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_assistance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_assistance" (
  "travel_assistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel assistance record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment where the need was evaluated */,
  "pre_injury_need" INTEGER /* Level of need for travel assistance before injury (1-4 scale) */,
  "post_injury_need" INTEGER /* Level of need for travel assistance after injury (1-4 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the travel assistance need */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_assistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_assistance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistance_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level of assistance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level of assistance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the healthcare provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment log */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment logged */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who conducted the assessment */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_provision" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provided */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided (e.g., home care, shopping assistance) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment that led to the service provision */,
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provision_service_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provision_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provision_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
